title: Geometry
description: Master circles, bounding boxes (AABB vs OBB), and basic intersection tests for collision geometry.
learningObjectives: Define circles, spheres, and rectangular bounding areas
Contrast Axis-Aligned Bounding Boxes (AABB) with Oriented Bounding Boxes (OBB)
Perform basic overlaps checks for simple boundary geometry

sections.title: Bounding Volumes and Collision Performance
sections.content:
Geometry defines the shapes of objects in games. Bounding volumes simplify complex 3D meshes into basic primitives to speed up collision queries:

1. **Axis-Aligned Bounding Box (AABB)**: The box edges are parallel to the global coordinate axes. Fast to check but doesn't rotate with the object.
2. **Oriented Bounding Box (OBB)**: The box rotates with the object. Fits the object tighter but requires complex matrix projections to test collisions.

sections.title: AABB vs AABB Collision Check
